main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'oxidative damage polyamide por cloro breakthrough + CAG agotado' literal.

key_signals.justification: Conecta cloro detectado + ORP + caída rechazo + ATP estable.

alternatives.justification: 3 alts (MECH O-ring, scaling, biofouling) con why_discardable.

recommended_action.justification: Stop chlorine + bisulfite 0.54 mg/L + GAC replacement — match gold operacional.

requested_data.justification: Pide 'free chlorine in permeate' — lugar conceptualmente incorrecto (cloro libre debe medirse en alimentación o tras CAG, no en permeato).

decision_change_condition.justification: Single threshold: cloro permeato <0.02 + FTIR sin carbonyl → MECH.

reviewer_notes: REQ incorrecto conceptualmente: cloro libre en permeato no discrimina daño oxidativo.
